raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Hydrogen-powered vehicle owners in California face a double taxation system.",
    "SB 419 seeks to correct the double taxation on hydrogen vehicles by aligning hydrogen taxation with local utility tax.",
    "The bill aims to create tax parity for Zero Emissions Vehicles, specifically hydrogen fuel cell vehicles.",
    "SB 419 will encourage the development of new hydrogen fuel stations in California.",
    "The bill is intended to increase the number of hydrogen-powered vehicles available to consumers.",
    "SB 419 will support California's climate change goals by aiming to reduce carbon emissions in the transportation sector.",
    "The legislation aims to encourage the production, consumption, and proliferation of hydrogen fuel markets across California.",
    "Existing taxation models for hydrogen are considered outdated and create an unnecessary financial burden for consumers."
  ]
}
```
